testeUnitarios/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK.
Add mockito-core dependency for mocking in tests.
Add mockito-junit-jupiter dependency for JUnit 5 integration.
Add junit-jupiter-api dependency for JUnit 5 testing.
Add junit-jupiter-engine dependency for JUnit 5 test execution.
Add powermock-api-mockito2 dependency for PowerMock integration with Mockito.
Add powermock-module-junit4 dependency for PowerMock JUnit 4 support.

Add @Setter annotation explicitly, likely to ensure setter generation or override defaults.
Add a new field 'filmes' of type List<Filme> to the entity.
